summary: Implemented a new deterministic Facebook Page Plugin iframe embed with load/timeout-based failure handling and added weather-height measurement to constrain the Facebook block on md+ viewports. However, the embedded Facebook page URL does not exactly match the required URL (missing trailing period), and the diff indicates multiple unrelated app-wide/header/footer/router changes that were not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Keep the Facebook presence block targeting the exact page URL: https://www.facebook.com/BaroboNationalHighSchool.
missing_requirements.reason: The Facebook page URL constant in the updated FacebookPresenceBlock omits the required trailing period, so it is not an exact match.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated app routing/imports (e.g., TanStack Router setup changes and removing a non-existent InkspirerPage import).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-6/7/8; BuildRequest explicitly warns against changing other sections/global behavior beyond fixing the Facebook embed rendering.

hallucinated_features.description: Navigation/header menu restructuring and responsive header updates.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; BuildRequest says not to change other Home page sections or global styling while fixing the Facebook embed.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer changes (styling/content updates such as contact info, marquee, logo alignment/scaling).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; BuildRequest forbids unrelated section/global styling changes.

hallucinated_features.description: Multiple other page content/theme adjustments (HistoryPage, OrganizationalStructurePage, CitizenCharterPage, StudentCornerPage, etc.).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by the Facebook embed fix requirements and conflicts with the constraint to avoid unrelated changes.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (mentions modifications across many frontend/src/pages/*.tsx files)
